Videyo ou monte a kontinye ap echwe sou sèvè. Rafrechi paj la oswa eseye ankò pita.
Upload of this clip keeps failing, keep retrying?
Videyo w'ap monte a kontinye ap echwe, kontinye eseye?
Users validate the accuracy of donated clips, checking that the speaker read the sentence correctly.
Itilizatè yo valide presizyon klip yo bay yo, tcheke si moun nan li fraz la kòrèkteman.
Validating donated clips is equally important to the Common Voice mission. Take a listen and help us create quality open source voice data.
Validasyon klip moun bay yo egalman enpòtan pou misyon Common Voice la. Pran yonn koute epi ede nou kreye bon jan kalite done vwa sous louvri.
Variants are a specific form of a language - for example shared by those living in a geography or commmunity. Sometimes these are called dialects.
Varyan(dyalèk) se yon fòm espesifik nan yon lang - pa egzanp pataje pa moun k ap viv nan yon jewografi oswa kominote. Pafwa yo rele sa yo dyalèk.
View your progress against personal and project goals.
Gade pwogrè'w kont objektif pèsonèl ak objektif pwojè yo.
Voice clips are entered into a submission queue that readies them for listening.
Klip vwa yo antre nan yon keu soumèt ki pare yo pou koute.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re excited about creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, developers need an extremely large amount of voice data.
Vwa natirèl, vwa se moun. Se poutèt sa nou kontan anpil nan kreye teknoloj vwa pou machin nou yo ka itilize. Men, pou kreye sistèm vwa, yon gwo kantite done vwa obligatwa.
Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re fascinated with creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, an extremely large amount of voice data is required.
Vwa natirèl, vwa se moun. Se poutèt sa nou kontan anpil nan kreye teknoloj vwa pou machin nou yo ka itilize. Men, pou kreye sistèm vwa, yon gwo kantite vwa done obligatwa.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Common Voice is part of Mozilla’s initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.

Teknoloji rekonesans vwa a ap revolisyone fason nou kominike avèk machin yo, men sistèm ki disponib kounye a yo chè e yo gen mèt pa yo. Common Voice fè pati inisyativ Mozilla pou fè teknoloji rekonesans vwa yo pi byen ak plis aksesib pou tout moun. Common Voice se yon gwo baz done mondyal ki gen vwa ki pèmèt nenpòt moun antrene aplikasyon pou vwa yo byen vit e fasil nan tout lang.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.
We're not only collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages but also in those with a smaller population of speakers. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and communities to address this gap themselves.

Teknoloji rekonesans vwa a ap revolisyone fason nou kominike avèk machin yo, men sistèm ki disponib kounye a yo chè ak pwòp. Mozilla Common Voice se yon inisyativ pou fè teknoloji rekonesans vwa yo pi byen ak plis aksesib pou tout moun. Common Voice se yon gwo baz done mondyal ki gen vwa ki pèmèt nenpòt moun antrene aplikasyon pou vwa yo byen vit e fasil nan tout lang.
Nou pa sèlman kolekte echantiyon vwa nan lang yo pale anpil men tou nan moun ki gen yon popilasyon ki pi piti nan moun ki pale lang panyo. Pibliye yon seri done divès vwa pral pèmèt devlopè, antreprenè, ak kominote yo abòde diferans sa nan mitan yo.
Vwa yo Ki An liy Kounye a
VoxForge was set up to collect transcribed speech for use with Free and Open Source Speech Recognition Engines.
VoxForge te etabli pou kolekte diskou transkri pou itilize ak Motè Rekonesans Lapawòl Sous Gratis ak Open Source.

Want to help make Common Voice even better? Great! Get in touch via email or <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> forums, submit site issues via <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>, or join the <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> community chat.

Ou vle ede fè Common Voice pi bon toujou? Gwo! Kontakte pa imel oswa <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> fowòm, soumèt pwoblèm sit atravè <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>, oswa rantre nan <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> chat kominotè.
Want to save your information? <createProfile>Create a profile</createProfile>
Ou vle kenbe enfòmasyon'w yo? <createProfile>Ebyen kreye yon pwofil</createProfile>
Want to stay in touch with Common Voice?
Ou vle rete an kontak ak Common Voice?
Want updates when we release a new version of the Common Voice dataset? Subscribe to our newsletter.
Vle mizajou lè nou lage yon nouvo vèsyon done Common Voice la? Abònman nan bilten nou an.
Watch our video explainer to help
Gade esplikasyon videyo nou an pou ede w
We are building an open and publicly available dataset of voices that everyone can use to train speech-enabled applications.
Nou ap konstwi yon seri done vwa ouvè epi ki disponib piblikman ke tout moun ka itilize pou antrene aplikasyon pou lapawòl.
We are going out to get a coffee.
We are going out to get coffee.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Nou menm nan Mozilla ap bati yon kominote sou teknoloji vwa. Nou ta renmen rete an kontak ak dènye nouvèl yo, nouvo sous done ak jwenn plis enfòmasyon sou ki jan w ap itilize done sa yo.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Nou menm nan Mozilla ap bati yon kominote sou teknoloji vwa. Nou ta renmen rete an kontak ak dènye nouvèl yo, nouvo sous done ak jwenn plis enfòmasyon sou ki jan w ap itilize done sa yo.

We believe that large and publicly available voice datasets foster innovation and healthy commercial competition in machine-learning based speech technology. This is a global effort and we invite everyone to participate. Our aim is to help speech technology be more inclusive, reflecting the diversity of voices from around the world.

Nou kwè ke gwo done vwa ki disponib piblikman ankouraje inovasyon ak konpetisyon komèsyal an sante nan teknoloji lapawòl ki baze sou aprantisaj machin. Sa a se yon efò mondyal epi nou envite tout moun patisipe. Objektif nou se ede teknoloji lapawòl gen plis enklizif, reflete divèsite vwa atravè mond lan.

We believe that large, publicly available voice datasets will foster innovation and healthy commercial competition in machine-learning based speech technology.
Common Voice’s multi-language dataset is already the largest publicly available voice dataset of its kind, but it’s not the only one.
Look to this page as a reference hub for other open source voice datasets and, as Common Voice continues to grow, a home for our release updates.

Nou kwè ke gwo, done vwa ki disponib piblikman pral ankouraje inovasyon ak konpetisyon komèsyal an sante nan teknoloji lapawòl ki baze sou aprantisaj machin.
Ansanm done milti-lang Common Voice se deja pi gwo done vwa ki disponib piblikman nan kalite li yo, men se pa youn nan sèlman.
Gade nan paj sa a kòm yon sant referans pou lòt done vwa sous louvri epi, pandan Common Voice ap kontinye grandi, yon kay pou mizajou lage nou yo.
We calculate hours by estimating the average length of each recording, and then multiplying that number by the total number of recordings across all languages.
Nou kalkile èdtan lè nou estime longè mwayèn chak anrejistreman, epi answit miltipliye nimewo sa pa kantite total anrejistreman nan tout lang.
We could not fetch the stats. Please try again later.
Nou pa t 'kapab jwen estatistik yo. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.
We couldn’t find that page for you
Nou pa t 'kapab jwenn paj sa a pou ou
We couldn’t get any audio clips for you to listen to. Please try again later.
Nou pa t 'kapab jwenn okenn klip odyo pou ou koute. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.
We couldn’t get any sentences for you to speak. Please try again later.
Nou pa t 'kapab jwenn okenn fraz pou ou pale. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.
We launch the Common Voice site in this language.
Nou lanse sit Common Voice nan lang sa a.
Welcome to the Common Voice Sentence Collector
Byenvini nan Common Voice Kolektè Fraz
We may have run out of clips - refresh the page, or try again later.
Nou genlè ta fini ak odyo yo - rafrechi paj la, oswa eseye ankò pita.
We may not have received that request. Please email us directly on <emailLink>{ $email }</emailLink> and we will get back to you!
Petèt nou pa te resevwa demann sa a. Tanpri imèl nou dirèkteman sou <emailLink>{ $email }</emailLink> epi n ap retounen jwenn ou!
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Nou pwomèt pou nou jere enfòmasyon ou yo avèk swen. Li plis nan <privacyLink>Avi sou Konfidansyalite</privacyLink> nou an.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Nou pwomèt pou nou jere enfòmasyon ou yo avèk swen. Li plis nan <privacyLink>Avi sou Konfidansyalite</privacyLink> nou an.
We’re building an open source, multi-language dataset of voices that anyone can use to train speech-enabled applications.
Nou ap konstwi yon sous ouvè, yon seri done plizyè lang nan vwa ke nenpòt moun ka itilize pou fòme aplikasyon pou lapawòl.
We’re crowdsourcing an open-source dataset of voices. Donate your voice, validate the accuracy of other people’s clips, make the dataset better for everyone.
Nou ap apwovizyone yon seri done sous louvri nan vwa. Bay vwa ou, valide presizyon klip lòt moun, fè seri done a pi bon pou tout moun.
We’re going out to get coffee.
We release the dataset every 3 months.
Nou pibliye ansanm done a chak 3 mwa.
We're receiving a lot of traffic and are currently investigating the issues.
N'ap resevwa anpil trafik e n'ap mennen ankèt sou pwoblèm yo kounye a.
We’re sorry, your platform is not currently supported.
Nou regrèt sa, platfòm ou a pa sipòte kounye a.

We use a Mozilla tool called <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> for translations. Pontoon has lots of languages, but if it doesn’t have yours you can <pontoonRequestLink>request for your language to be added</pontoonRequestLink>. Then, to make the language available on the Common Voice project, <githubRepoLink>request the new language on GitHub</githubRepoLink>. <localizationFragment>See more on site translation</localizationFragment>.

Nou itilize yon zouti Mozilla ki rele <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> pou tradiksyon. Pontoon gen anpil lang, men si li pa genyen ou ou ka <pontoonRequestLink>mande pou yo ajoute lang ou</pontoonRequestLink>. Lè sa a, pou fè lang lan disponib sou pwojè Common Voice la, <githubRepoLink>mande nouvo lang lan sou GitHub</githubRepoLink>. <localizationFragment>Gade plis sou tradiksyon sit</localizationFragment>.
We’ve made some changes. Delta Segments just contain the most recent clips since the last release. <deltaLink>Read more about this work</deltaLink>.
Nou te fè kèk chanjman. Segman Delta jis genyen klip ki pi resan yo depi dènye liberasyon an. <deltaLink>Li plis sou travay sa a</deltaLink>.
We've run out of sentences to record in this language...
Nou te fini nan fraz yo anrejistre nan lang sa a...
We want speech models to be better at understanding a diverse range of speakers. For this to happen, a voice dataset must represent lots of different people.
Nou vle modèl lapawòl yo pi byen konprann yon seri divès moun ki pale. Pou sa rive, yon seri done vwa dwe reprezante anpil moun diferan.

We want the Common Voice dataset to reflect the audio quality a speech-to-text engine will hear in the wild, so we’re looking for variety. In addition to a diverse community of speakers, a dataset with varying audio quality will teach the speech-to-text engine to handle various real-world situations, from background talking to car noise. As long as your voice clip is intelligible, it should be good enough for the dataset.

Nou vle done Common Voice reflete bon jan kalite odyo yon motè diskou-a-tèks pral tande nan bwa, kidonk nou ap chèche varyete. Anplis yon kominote divès moun ki pale, yon seri done ak kalite odyo varye pral anseye motè lapawòl-a-tèks pou jere divès sitiyasyon nan mond reyèl la, soti nan background pale ak bri machin. Osi lontan ke clip vwa ou a konprann, li ta dwe bon ase pou dataset la.
We will also let our community manager know that you’re interested, so they can give you any extra support or information you might need.
Nou pral fè manadjè kominote nou an konnen tou ke w ap enterese, pou yo ka ba ou nenpòt sipò oswa enfòmasyon siplemantè ou ta ka bezwen.
We will be in touch with more information about how to add your language to Common Voice very soon.
N ap pran kontak ak plis enfòmasyon sou fason pou ajoute lang ou a nan Common Voice trè byento.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
Nou gen pou nou pran kontak avè w ak plis enfòmasyon depi yo disponib.
We will not make your email public.
Nou pa'p fè imèl ou an piblik.

We work with foundations, civil society and community partners to make the internet a healthier place, with a particular focus on East Africa. Learn more about our <programmaticWork>programmatic work.</programmaticWork>

Nou travay ak fondasyon, sosyete sivil ak patnè kominotè yo pou fè entènèt la yon kote ki pi an sante, ak yon konsantrasyon patikilye sou Afrik lès. Aprann plis sou <programmaticWork>travay pwogram nou an.</programmaticWork>
What does it mean that I can’t “determine the identity” of speakers in the Common Voice dataset?
Kisa sa vle di mwen pa ka "detèmine idantite" moun ki pale yo nan seri done Common Voice la?
What is a language on Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se yon lang sou Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se Common Voice?
What issues are you experiencing with this sentence?
Ki pwoblèm w'ap fè eksperyans ak fraz sa a?
What kind of goal do you want to build?
Ki kalite objektif ou vle bati?
What level of audio quality is required for a voice clip to be used in the dataset?
Ki nivo bon jan kalite odyo ki nesesè pou yon klip vwa yo dwe itilize nan seri done a?
What’s inside the Common Voice dataset?
Ki sa ki nan seri done Common Voice la?
What’s the difference between Common Voice and Deep Speech?
Ki diferans ki genyen ant Common Voice (vwa komen) ak Deep Speech (diskou pwofon)?
When a user rejects a voice clip it returns to the Queue. If rejected a second time, the voice clip is moved to the Clip Graveyard.
Lè yon itilizatè rejte yon clip vwa li retounen nan keu la. Si yo rejte yon dezyèm fwa, clip vwa a deplase nan simetyèr Clip la.
When will you release Common Voice data in other languages?
Kilè w ap pibliye done Common Voice nan lòt lang?
Where are these <wikipediaLink>public domain</wikipediaLink> sentences from?
Ki kote fraz <wikipediaLink>domèn piblik</wikipediaLink> sa yo soti?
Where does the source text come from?
Ki kote tèks sous la soti?
Which variant of { $language } do you speak?
Why don’t you ask people to read from books or Wikipedia articles in different languages?
Poukisa ou pa mande moun li nan liv oswa atik Wikipedya yo nan diferan lang?
Why do you need so many different speakers per language?
Poukisa ou bezwen anpil moun ki pale diferan pou chak lang?
Why is 10,000 validated hours the per language goal for capturing audio?
Poukisa se 10,000 èdtan valide se objektif pou chak lang pou kaptire odyo?
Why is Common Voice part of the Mozilla mission?
Poukisa Common Voice fè pati misyon Mozilla la?
Why is my language not included yet?
Poukisa lang mwen an poko enkli?
Why should I sign up for an account?
Poukisa mwen ta dwe enskri pou yon kont?
With a profile, you can keep track of your activity and connect with a community of voice data contributors.
Avèk yon pwofil, ou ka kenbe tras aktivite'w epi konekte ak yon kominote ki gen kontribitè done vwa yo.
Would you like to share some information about how you speak?
Èske ou ta renmen pataje kèk enfòmasyon sou fason'w pale?
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Wi, voye imèl ban mwen. Mwen ta renmen rete enfòme sou Pwojè Common Voice lan.
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
Wi, voye imèl ban mwen. Mwen ta renmen rete enfòme sou pwogrè lang sa a sou Common Voice.

Yes, we especially want your voice! Part of the aim of Common Voice is to gather as many different accents as possible so that voice recognition services work equally well for everyone. This means donations from non-native speakers are particularly important.

Wi, nou espesyalman vle vwa'w! Yon pati nan objektif Common Voice se rasanble otan aksan ak dyalèk diferan posib pou sèvis rekonesans vwa yo travay egalman byen pou tout moun. Sa vle di kontribisyon ki soti nan moun ki pa pale natif natal yo patikilyèman enpòtan.
You are about to initiate a download of <size>{ $size }GB</size>, proceed?
Ou pare pou kòmanse yon telechajman de { $size }
You are prepared to initiate a download of { $size }
Ou pare pou kòmanse yon telechajman de { $size }
You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
Ou ka chwazi pou fè non itilizatè ou an piblik oswa anonim.

You can go to the <datasetsPage>datasets page</datasetsPage>, select the version and language(s) you want, and download it! The files have <metadataLink>associated metadata</metadataLink>, such as demographic information and validation data. You’ll need to provide an email address to download the dataset.

Ou ka ale nan <datasetsPage>paj datasets</datasetsPage>, chwazi vèsyon ak lang ou vle a, epi telechaje li! Dosye yo gen <metadataLink>metadata ki asosye</metadataLink>, tankou enfòmasyon demografik ak done validation. Ou pral bezwen bay yon adrès imel pou telechaje dataset la.
You can help build a diverse, open-source dataset by creating a Common Voice profile and contributing your voice.
Ou ka ede konstwi yon seri done divès, sous louvri lè'w kreye yon pwofil Common Voice epi kontribye vwa'w.
You can meet others in the Mozilla language communities by joining <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> for topical conversations, or <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> for quick advice.
Ou ka rankontre lòt moun nan kominote lang Mozilla yo lè w rantre nan <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> pou konvèsasyon aktualite, oswa <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> pou jwenn konsèy rapid.

You can run events to help people contribute. It’s easier than you think. You could do it online with a videoconferencing tool, or in person if it’s safe. <eventTemplate>Check out our templates and resources for running events</eventTemplate>.

Ou ka òganize evènman pou ede moun kontribiye. Li pi fasil pase ou panse. Ou ta ka fè li sou entènèt ak yon zouti videyokonferans, oswa an pèsòn si li an sekirite. <eventTemplate>Tcheke modèl nou yo ak resous pou òganize evènman</eventTemplate>.

You can <sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>add small numbers of sentences</sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>, or you can do <bulkImportDocsLink>bulk imports using Github</bulkImportDocsLink>. Remember that sentences need to be <licenseLink>CC0 (or public domain)</licenseLink>, or you can write your own.

Ou ka <sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>ajoute yon ti kantite fraz</sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>, oswa ou ka fè <bulkImportDocsLink>enpòtasyon an gwo lè l sèvi avèk Github</bulkImportDocsLink>. Sonje ke fraz yo dwe <licenseLink>CC0 (oswa domèn piblik)</licenseLink>, oswa ou ka ekri pwòp ou a.
You can use the <scraperLink>Sentence extractor</scraperLink> to leverage short sentences from Wikipedia.
Ou ka itilize <scraperLink>Èkstraksyon fraz</scraperLink> pou pwofite fraz kout ki soti nan Wikipedya.

You could use social media platforms to get the message out. Share posts that explain why it matters, and get in touch with other people talking about issues like language rights, voice AI, or bias in tech. See more advice on <campaignLink>running a social campaign, including content you can re-use</campaignLink>.

Ou ta ka itilize platfòm medya sosyal pou fè mesaj la soti. Pataje pòs ki eksplike poukisa li enpòtan, epi pran kontak ak lòt moun k ap pale sou pwoblèm tankou dwa langaj, AI vwa, oswa patipri nan teknoloji. Gade plis konsèy sou <campaignLink>kouri yon kanpay sosyal, enkli kontni ou ka re-itilize</campaignLink>.
You have not added any languages yet.

Your accent is the way you pronounce words. It can be shaped by where you have lived, which other languages you speak and lots of other factors. You can share any information you feel is relevant here.
Dyalèk ou se fason ou pwononse mo yo. Li ka fòme pa kote ou te viv, ki lòt lang ou pale ak anpil lòt faktè. Ou ka pataje nenpòt enfòmasyon ou santi ki enpòtan isit la.
Your daily goal has been created
You’re contributing to a target segment
Ou ap kontribye nan yon segman sib
You’re contributing to our first target segment
Ou ap kontribiye nan premye segman sib nou an
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
Non itilizatè ou ak imel ou pa'p asosye ak done ki pibliye yo.
Your weekly goal has been created
Objektif chak semèn ou sot kreye
You should receive an email shortly explaining the steps to get your language added to Common Voice
Ou ta dwe resevwa yon imèl yon ti tan eksplike etap yo pou jwenn lang ou ajoute nan Common Voice
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } recording goal!
Ou te ede Common Voice rive nan <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> objektif anrejistreman { $goalValue } nou chak jou!
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } validation goal!
Ou te ede Common Voice rive nan <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> nou chak jou pou { $goalValue } objektif validasyon !
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
Ou reyisi enskri pou kontribye sou lang { $language }. Mèsi.

Abbreviations and Acronyms. Abbreviations and acronyms like “USA” or “ICE” should be avoided in the source text because they may be read in a way that does not coincide with their spelling. Additionally, there may be multiple accurate readings for a single abbreviation. For example, the acronym “ICE” could be pronounced “I-C-E” or as a single word.

Abreviyasyon ak akwonim. Abreviyasyon ak akwonim tankou "USA" oswa "ICE" ta dwe evite nan tèks sous la paske yo ka li nan yon fason ki pa kowenside ak òtograf yo. Anplis de sa, ka gen plizyè lekti egzat pou yon sèl abrevyasyon. Pou egzanp, akwonim "ICE" ka pwononse "I-C-E" oswa kòm yon sèl mo.

All sentences you submit must be under <wikipediaLink>Public Domain (CC-0) license</wikipediaLink>. To support the inclusion of work not under public licence, we have created a <cc0WaiverLink>Contributions Agreement template</cc0WaiverLink> for works where the copyright owner would like to contribute the material to Common Voice.

Tout fraz ou voye yo dwe anba <wikipediaLink>Lisans Domèn Piblik (CC-0)</wikipediaLink>. Pou sipòte enklizyon travay ki pa anba lisans piblik, nou te kreye yon <cc0WaiverLink>Modèl Akò Kontribisyon</cc0WaiverLink> pou travay kote pwopriyetè copyright a ta renmen kontribye materyèl la nan Common Voice.

A quiet background hubbub is OK, but we don’t want additional voices that may cause a machine algorithm to identify words that are not in the written text. If you can hear distinct words apart from those of the text, the clip should be rejected. Typically this happens where the TV has been left on, or where there is a conversation going on nearby.

Yon trankil background se OK, men nou pa vle vwa adisyonèl ki ka lakòz yon algorithm machin idantifye mo ki pa nan tèks ekri a. Si ou ka tande mo diferan de sa yo ki nan tèks la, clip la ta dwe rejte. Tipikman sa rive kote yo te kite televizyon an, oswa kote gen yon konvèsasyon k ap pase tou pre.
Ou vini? [yo rele pa yon lòt]

Be cautious before rejecting a clip on the ground that the reader has mispronounced a word, has put the stress in the wrong place, or has apparently ignored a question mark. There are a wide variety of pronunciations in use around the world, some of which you may not have heard in your local community. Please provide a margin of appreciation for those who may speak differently from you.

Fè atansyon anvan ou rejte yon clip sou tè a ke lektè a te mal pwononse yon mo, li te mete estrès la nan move kote, oswa li te aparamman inyore yon mak kesyon. Gen yon gran varyete pwononsyasyon yo itilize atravè mond lan, kèk nan yo ou ka pa te tande nan kominote lokal ou a. Tanpri bay yon maj nan apresyasyon pou moun ki ka pale yon fason diferan de ou.
[‘Beret’ is OK whether with stress on the first syllable (UK) or the second (US)]
['Beret' se OK si ak estrès sou premye silab la (UK) oswa dezyèm lan (US)]
{ $clipCount } voice clips, total archive size { $size }. Expires { $expires }.
{ $clipCount } klip vwa, gwosè total achiv { $size }. Ekspire { $expires }.
Common Voice is the world’s largest publicly available, multi-language voice dataset.
Common Voice se pi gwo done vwa ki gen plizyè lang ki disponib piblikman nan mond lan.

Common Voice recordings are used by academics, small businesses, and voice recognition enthusiasts to help train and grow publicly available resources like voice models.
Can you let us know why you would like your recordings deleted?

Anrejistreman vwa komen yo itilize pa akademik, ti biznis, ak amater rekonesans vwa pou ede fòme ak devlope resous ki disponib piblikman tankou modèl vwa.
Èske ou ka fè nou konnen poukisa ou ta renmen efase anrejistreman ou yo?
{ $countOfReviewed } sentences are already reviewed. Great job!
{ $countOfReviewed } fraz yo deja revize. Bon travay!
{ $countOfUnreviewed } sentences are unreviewed. If you want, you can also review your sentences now before submitting them.
{ $countOfUnreviewed } fraz yo pa revize. Si ou vle, ou kapab tou revize fraz ou yo kounye a anvan ou soumèt yo.
Error while fetching your sentences. Please try again.
Erè pandan ap chèche fraz rejte yo. Tanpri eseye ankò.

Expert linguists can also help, try to reach out to local linguistic universities (both teachers and students) and see if they can help to gather a diverse set of sound-diverse sentences in your language.
Ekspè lengwis yo ka ede tou, eseye kontakte inivèsite lengwistik lokal yo (tou de pwofesè yo ak elèv yo) epi wè si yo ka ede yo rasanble yon seri divès kalite fraz nan lang ou a.
Filtered sentences due to requirements failing (please submit fixed versions as new sentences):
Fraz filtre yo akòz kondisyon ki echwe (tanpri soumèt vèsyon fiks kòm nouvo fraz):
Finding existing sentences in the Public Domain
Jwenn fraz ki egziste deja nan domèn piblik la

Foreign letters. Letters must be valid in the language being spoken. For example, “ж” is a letter in the Russian alphabet but is never used in English and so should never appear in any English source text.
Lèt etranje. Lèt yo dwe valab nan lang yo pale a. Pou egzanp, "ж" se yon lèt nan alfabè Ris la men li pa janm itilize nan lang angle e konsa pa ta dwe janm parèt nan nenpòt tèks sous angle.

For every voice clip donated, and every audio clip validated, your account dashboards are updated to reflect your latest progress in each language you contribute to. Yes, you can contribute to more than one!

Use dashboards to track your stats, see how you're doing alongside others in the community, and set daily or weekly contribution goals.

Pou chak clip vwa yo bay, ak chak clip odyo valide, tablodbò kont ou yo mete ajou pou reflete dènye pwogrè ou nan chak lang ou kontribye. Wi, ou ka kontribye nan plis pase yon sèl!

Sèvi ak tablodbò pou swiv estatistik ou yo, wè ki jan w ap fè ansanm ak lòt moun nan kominote a, epi fikse objektif kontribisyon chak jou oswa chak semèn.
For public domain text not available online, you could use academic referencing style e.g Harvard style "Jess (2021) My Public licence poems"
Pou tèks domèn piblik ki pa disponib sou entènèt, ou ta ka itilize style referans akademik pa egzanp style Harvard "Jess (2021) Powèm lisans piblik mwen an"
Government proceedings, books and articles are also great however since the text tends to be a little more formal they are less of a priority.
Pwosedi gouvènman an, liv ak atik yo tou gwo sepandan depi tèks la gen tandans yo dwe yon ti kras plis fòmèl yo gen mwens nan yon priyorite.
Having a profile is not required to contribute though it is helpful, see why below.
Ou pa oblije gen yon kont pou kontribye, poutan li tap itil.
Help Common Voice reach { $hours } hours in a language with a personal goal
Ede Common Voice rive nan { $hours } èdtan yo nan yon lang ak yon objektif pèsonèl
Help reach { $hours } hours in { $language } with a personal goal
Ede atenn { $hours } èdtan yo nan { $language } ak yon objektif pèsonèl
Help us by reviewing sentences for correctness according to the guidelines.
Ede nou nan revize fraz yo pou yo kòrèk dapre direktiv yo.
Help us by writing or collecting Public Domain sentences.
Ede nou lè w ekri oswa kolekte fraz nan domèn piblik.
Here are the links to download your ZIP files.
Men lyen pou telechaje dosye ZIP ou yo.
I confirm that these sentences are <wikipediaLink>public domain</wikipediaLink> and I have permission to upload them.
Mwen konfime ke fraz sa yo se <wikipediaLink>domèn piblik</wikipediaLink> e mwen gen pèmisyon pou m telechaje yo.
If the recording breaks up, or has crackles, reject unless the entirety of the text can still be heard.
Si anrejistreman an kase, oswa gen krak, rejte sof si tout tèks la ka toujou tande.
If the recording breaks up, or has crackles, reject unless the entirety of the text can still be heard.
Si anrejistreman an kase, oswa gen krak, rejte sof si tout tèks la ka toujou tande.
If the sentence does not meet the above criteria, click the "Reject" button. If you are unsure about the sentence, you may also skip it and move on to the next one.
Si fraz la pa satisfè kritè ki anwo yo, klike sou "Rejte" bouton sou bò gòch la. Si ou pa sèten sou fraz la, ou ka sote'l tou epi ale nan pwochen an.
If you come across something that these guidelines don’t cover, please vote according to your best judgement. If you really can’t decide, use the skip button and go on to the next recording.
Si ou rankontre yon bagay ke gid sa yo pa kouvri, tanpri vote selon pi bon jijman ou. Si ou reyèlman pa ka deside, sèvi ak bouton an sote epi ale nan pwochen anrejistreman an.
If your language is not listed here, you can request it through <languageProcessLink>this process</languageProcessLink>.
Si lang ou a pa nan lis la a, ou ka mande li atravè <languageProcessLink>pwosesis sa a</languageProcessLink>.
If you run out of sentences to review, please help us collect more sentences!
Si'w fini ak fraz pou revize, tanpri ede nou kolekte plis fraz!
I just created a personal goal for voice donation to #CommonVoice -- join me and help teach machines how real people speak { $link }
Mwen jis kreye yon objektif pèsonèl pou don vwa pou #CommonVoice -- vin jwenn mwen epi ede anseye machin yo kijan moun reyèl yo pale { $link }
Includes mp3s and related sentences, may take some time to prepare
Gen ladan mp3 ak fraz ki gen rapò, ka pran kèk tan pou prepare

It's important that you reference where you found the public licence to avoid plagiarism and to allow for follow ups on <copyrightIssuesLink>copyright issues</copyrightIssuesLink>. Here are a few ways you can cite the work.

Li enpòtan pou w fè referans ak kote ou te jwenn lisans piblik la pou w evite plagiat epi pou w pèmèt fè swivi sou <copyrightIssuesLink>pwoblèm dwadwa</copyrightIssuesLink>. Men kèk fason ou ka site travay la.

Languages can have their <validationRulesLink>own validation rules</validationRulesLink> with additional requirements. If there is no specific validation file for a language, we are using the generic English rules.
Lang yo ka gen <validationRulesLink>pwòp règ validasyon yo</validationRulesLink> ak kondisyon adisyonèl. Si pa gen okenn dosye validation espesifik pou yon lang, n ap itilize règ jenerik angle yo.
Missing an 's' at the end of a word.
Manke yon ' nan fen yon mo.
Missing 'A' or 'The' at the beginning of the recording.
Manke 'A' oswa 'The' nan kòmansman anrejistreman an.
Missing the end of the last word by cutting off the recording too quickly.
Manke fen dènye mo a lè w koupe anrejistreman an twò vit.
[More has been recorded than the required text]
[Yo anrejistre plis pase tèks obligatwa a]

Most recordings are of people talking in their natural voice. You can accept the occasional non-standard recording that is shouted, whispered, or obviously delivered in a ‘dramatic’ voice. Please reject sung recordings and those using a computer-synthesized voice.

Pifò anrejistreman se moun k ap pale ak vwa natirèl yo. Ou ka aksepte okazyonèl anrejistreman ki pa estanda ke yo rele byen fò, chichote, oswa evidamman delivre nan yon vwa 'dramatik'. Tanpri rejte anrejistreman chante ak sa ki sèvi ak yon vwa sentèz òdinatè.
Note: When set to 'Visible', this setting can be changed from the <profileLink>Profile page</profileLink>
Note: Lè yo mete stati 'Vizib', yo ka chanje paramèt sa a nan <profileLink>paj Pwofil</profileLink>.

Now that you know a little bit more about Common Voice, why not try it out? Click on the microphone icon to start reading sentences aloud.

If you prefer to review other people's voice contributions, click on the play icon. You’ll help confirm that recordings match the sentences written on screen.

Kounye a ke w konnen yon ti kras plis sou Common Voice, poukisa ou pa eseye li? Klike sou ikòn mikwofòn lan pou kòmanse li fraz awotvwa.

Si w prefere revize kontribisyon vwa lòt moun, klike sou ikòn jwe a. Ou pral ede konfime ke anrejistreman yo matche ak fraz yo ekri sou ekran an.

Numbers. There should be no digits in the source text because they can cause problems when read aloud. The way a number is read depends on context and might introduce confusion in the dataset. For example, the number “2409” could be accurately read as both “twenty-four zero nine” and “two thousand four hundred nine”.

Nimewo. Pa ta dwe gen okenn chif nan tèks sous la paske yo ka lakòz pwoblèm lè li awotvwa. Fason yo li yon nimewo depann de kontèks epi li ka prezante konfizyon nan seri done a. Pou egzanp, nimewo "2409" ta ka li avèk presizyon kòm tou de "vennkat zewo nèf" ak "de mil kat san nèf".

On the other hand, if you think that the reader has probably never come across the word before, and is simply making an incorrect guess at the pronunciation, please reject. If you are unsure, use the skip button.
Nan lòt men an, si ou panse ke lektè a pwobableman pa janm jwenn mo a anvan, epi li tou senpleman fè yon devine kòrèk nan pwononsyasyon an, tanpri rejte. Si ou pa sèten, sèvi ak bouton sote a.
[Part of the text can’t be heard]
[Yon pati nan tèks la pa ka tande]
Personal dashboards keep you up-to-date with individual and community progress.
Tablo grafik pèsonèl kenbe ou ajou ak pwogrè endividyèl ak kominote a.

Punctuation. Special symbols and punctuation should only be included when absolutely necessary. For example, an apostrophe is included in English words like “don’t” and “we’re” and should be included in the source text, but it’s unlikely you’ll ever need a special symbol like “@” or “#.”

Ponktiyasyon. Senbòl espesyal ak ponktiyasyon yo ta dwe sèlman enkli lè absoliman nesesè. Pa egzanp, yon apòt yo enkli nan mo angle tankou "don't" ak "we're" epi yo ta dwe enkli nan tèks sous la, men li pa posib pou w janm bezwen yon senbòl espesyal tankou "@" oswa "#". ”
[‘Raised’ in English is always pronounced as one syllable, not two]
['Raised' nan lang angle toujou pwononse kòm yon sèl silab, pa de]
Reading contractions that aren't actually there, such as "We're" instead of "We are", or vice versa.
Lekti kontraksyon ki pa aktyèlman la, tankou "Nou se" olye de "Nou se", oswa vis vèrsa.
Read our How-to if unsure how to attribute
Li Fason nou an si w pa sèten kijan pou atribiye
Ready to add your voice or lend your ear?
Pare pou ajoute vwa ou oswa prete zòrèy ou?
[Recording cut off before the end of the last word]
[Anrejistreman koupe anvan fen dènye mo a]

Remember that we need permission to publish those sentences, so always ensure that the text belongs to the <wikipediaLink>public domain</wikipediaLink>. If there is no explicit indication, reach out to the person that the text belongs to and ask if they want to contribute their text to the Public Domain. If they want to, help them go through the <cc0WaiverLink>Contributions Agreement</cc0WaiverLink> process. If they do not want to contribute the text, then you are not allowed to use that text.

Sonje ke nou bezwen pèmisyon pou pibliye fraz sa yo, kidonk toujou asire tèks la fè pati <wikipediaLink>domèn piblik</wikipediaLink>. Si pa gen okenn endikasyon eksplisit, kontakte moun ki tèks la fè pati epi mande si yo vle kontribye tèks yo nan Domèn Piblik la. Si yo vle, ede yo ale nan pwosesis <cc0WaiverLink>Akò Kontribisyon</cc0WaiverLink>. Si yo pa vle kontribye tèks la, lè sa a ou pa gen dwa sèvi ak tèks sa a.
Sentences are being uploaded. This can take several minutes depending on the number of sentences added. Please do not close this website.
Yo monte telechaje fraz yo. Sa ka pran plizyè minit selon kantite fraz yo ajoute. Tanpri pa fèmen sit entènèt sa a.
Sentences not submitted, are you sure you want to leave?
Fraz yo pa soumèt, èske ou sèten ou vle kite?
Divize an { $archiveCount } fichye ZIP ki genyen
[Sneeze] The giant dinosaurs of the [cough] Triassic.
[Etènye] Dinozò yo jeyan nan [tous] Triasik la.
Submitted sentences. { $duplicates } sentences were rejected as duplicates.
Soumèt fraz yo. Yo te rejte fraz yo { $duplicates } kòm kopi.
Thanks to contributions from over 259k people in over 50 languages, this data is being used to train speech-enabled applications to better respond to the human voice.
Gras a kontribisyon plis pase 259k moun nan plis pase 50 lang, done sa yo ap itilize pou fòme aplikasyon pou pale pou yo pi byen reponn a vwa imen an.
The best sources you can look for are podcasts, transcripts, movie scripts and anything that potential can contain everyday conversations.
Pi bon sous ou ka chèche pou yo se podcasts, relve nòt, fim scripts ak tout bagay ki potansyèl kapab genyen konvèsasyon chak jou.
The Common Voice Sentence Collector has collected { $sentenceCount } sentences in { $languageCount } languages!
Pèseptè fraz vwa komen an kolekte { $sentenceCount } fraz nan { $languageCount } lang!
The giant dinosaur of the Triassic.
Dinozò yo jeyan nan triyas la.
The giant dinosaurs of the Triassi-.
Dinozò yo jeyan nan triyas la.
The giant dinosaurs of the Triassic. [read by one voice]
Dinozò yo jeyan nan triyas la. [li pa yon sèl vwa]
The giant dinosaurs of the Triassic. Yes.
Dinozò yo jeyan nan triyas la.

There are a lot of public organizations that might want to collaborate and already have a lot of texts they can donate as public domain. Reach out to local universities, Governments and open source organizations to talk about the project and ask for their help.

Gen yon anpil nan òganizasyon piblik ki ta ka vle kolabore ak deja gen yon anpil nan tèks yo ka bay kòm domèn piblik. Kontakte inivèsite lokal yo, Gouvènman ak òganizasyon sous louvri pou pale sou pwojè a epi mande èd yo.

There will be natural variations in volume between readers. Reject only if the volume is so high that the recording breaks up, or (more commonly) if it is so low that you can’t hear what is being said without reference to the written text.

Pral gen varyasyon natirèl nan volim ant lektè yo. Rejte sèlman si volim nan tèlman wo ke anrejistreman an kase, oswa (pi souvan) si li tèlman ba ke ou pa ka tande sa y ap di san referans ak tèks ekri a.

The Sentence Collector is part of <commonVoiceLink>Common Voice</commonVoiceLink>. It allows contributors to collect and validate sentences created by the community. You can use this tool also to import and clean-up small-to-medium-sized public domain corpus you have found or collected. All sentences need to be Public Domain. Approved sentences are exported every week to the Common Voice repository and are released on the Common Voice website on every new deployment.

Sentence Collector fè pati <commonVoiceLink>Common Voice</commonVoiceLink>. Li pèmèt kontribitè yo kolekte epi valide fraz kominote a kreye. Ou ka sèvi ak zouti sa a tou pou enpòte ak netwaye ti kòb domèn piblik ou te jwenn oswa kolekte. Tout fraz yo dwe Domèn Piblik. Fraz yo apwouve yo ekspòte chak semèn nan depo Common Voice epi yo pibliye yo sou sit entènèt Common Voice sou chak nouvo deplwaman.

This page gives you an overview of all your submitted sentences. You may also delete already submitted sentences if needed, by marking the checkbox next to it and clicking on "Delete selected sentences" at the bottom. Please only remove sentences if absolutely necessary, for example if you noticed after the fact that a sentence is copyright protected.

Paj sa a ba ou yon apèsi sou tout fraz ou soumèt yo. Ou ka efase fraz ki deja soumèt tou si sa nesesè, lè w make kaz ki bò kote l epi klike sou "Efase fraz yo chwazi yo" anba. Tanpri retire fraz sèlman si absoliman nesesè, pou egzanp si ou remake apre lefèt ke yon fraz pwoteje dwatè.

This setting controls your leaderboard visibility. When hidden, your progress will be private. This means your image, user name and progress will not appear on the leaderboard. Note that leaderboard refresh takes ~{ $minutes }min to populate changes.

Opsyon sa a kontwole vizibilite klasman ou. Lè kache, pwogrè ou pral prive. Sa vle di imaj ou, non itilizatè ak pwogrè pa pral parèt sou leaderboard la. Remake byen ke rafrechisman leaderboard pran ~{ $minutes }min pou ranpli chanjman yo.
{ $totalHours } hours is achievable in just over { $periodMonths } months if { $people } people record { $clipsPerDay } clips a day.
{ $totalHours } èdtan yo ka reyalize nan yon ti kras plis pase { $periodMonths } mwa si { $people } moun anrejistre { $clipsPerDay } clip pa jou.
To the right we outline the benefits and clarify what information we make public. Use the links below to get started with a Common Voice account on your own device.
Adwat nou dekri benefis yo epi klarifye ki enfòmasyon nou fè piblik. Sèvi ak lyen ki anba yo pou kòmanse ak yon kont Common Voice sou pwòp aparèy ou.
Unfortunately we can’t have Wikimedia articles yet. So do not copy paste from there.
Malerezman nou poko ka gen atik Wikimedia. Se konsa, pa kopye keratin soti nan la.
We failed to fetch available languages. Contributions are currently not possible. Please try again later.
Nou echwe pou jwenn lang ki disponib yo. Kontribisyon yo pa posib kounye a. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.

We prefer natural/conversational sentences. While phonetic diversity and different words in sentences is important, we are trying to make recording sentences as much fun as possible. Therefore it would be great if you could try to keep your sentences as natural/engaging as possible.

Nou pito fraz natirèl/konvèsasyon. Pandan ke divèsite fonetik ak diferan mo nan fraz yo enpòtan, nou ap eseye fè anrejistreman fraz yo plezi anpil ke posib. Se poutèt sa li ta gwo si ou ta ka eseye kenbe fraz ou yo kòm natirèl / angaje ke posib.

We want the machine learning algorithms to able to handle a variety of background noise, and even relatively loud noises can be accepted provided that they don’t prevent you from hearing the entirety of the text. Quiet background music is OK; music loud enough to prevent you from hearing each and every word is not.

Nou vle algorithm aprantisaj machin yo kapab jere yon varyete de bri background, e menm bri relativman fò yo ka aksepte depi yo pa anpeche w tande tout tèks la. Mizik background trankil se OK; mizik byen fò ase pou anpeche w tande chak ak chak mo se pa.

We will review your request to remove your voice recordings from the dataset. If your request is approved, we will contact those who have downloaded the dataset and request they remove your voice recordings as well.

Nou pral revize demann ou an pou retire anrejistreman vwa ou yo nan seri done a. Si demann ou an apwouve, nou pral kontakte moun ki te telechaje done a epi mande yo retire anrejistreman vwa ou yo tou.

When listening, check very carefully that what has been recorded is exactly what has been written; reject if there are even minor errors.
Very common mistakes include:

Lè w ap koute, tcheke avèk anpil atansyon ke sa ki anrejistre se egzakteman sa ki ekri; rejte si gen menm erè minè.
Erè trè komen yo enkli:
When you request your recordings, we compile them into one or multiple ZIP files. Here are your past requests:
Lè ou mande anrejistreman ou yo, nou konpile yo nan youn oswa plizyè dosye ZIP. Men demann ou sot pase yo:
Would you like to request your voice recordings be deleted too, or do you prefer to keep them in the Common Voice dataset?
Èske w ta renmen mande pou yo efase anrejistreman vwa w yo tou, oswa èske w prefere kenbe yo nan seri done Common Voice la?
You can also copy and paste the direct URLs into your favorite download manager. They will expire in 12 hours, but you can come back to this page to generate new ones any time.
Ou kapab tou kopye epi kole URL dirèk yo nan manadjè download pi renmen ou. Yo pral ekspire nan 12 èdtan, men ou ka tounen nan paj sa a pou jenere nouvo nenpòt ki lè.
You cannot request your recordings while another request is already in progress.
Ou pa kapab mande anrejistreman ou yo pandan yon lòt demann deja ap fèt.
You can request a new takeout of your recordings every { $days } days.
Ou ka mande yon nouvo retire anrejistreman ou yo chak { $days } jou.
You could include the website, e.g "Common Voice - https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/"
Ou ta ka mete sit entènèt la, pa egzanp "Common Voice - https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/"
You could use academic referencing style, e.g Harvard style "Mozilla (2021) Common Voice. Available at https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/ (Accessed: 15th September 2021)"
Ou ta ka itilize style referans akademik, pa egzanp style Harvard "Mozilla (2021) Common Voice. Disponib nan https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/ (Aksè: 15 septanm 2021)"
Your anonymous voice recordings will remain in the Common Voice dataset. Once you delete your profile you will no longer be able to submit a request to remove your recordings from the dataset
Anrejistreman vwa anonim ou yo ap rete nan seri done Common Voice la. Yon fwa ou efase pwofil ou a ou p ap kapab soumèt yon demann ankò pou retire anrejistreman ou yo nan seri done a.
You're currently set to <bold>NOT</bold> receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Aktyèlman w ap fikse pou <bold>PA</bold> resevwa imèl tankou rapèl objektif, mwen mizajou sou pwogrè ak bilten sou Common Voice
You're currently set to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Aktyèlman w ap fikse pou resevwa imèl tankou rapèl objektif, mwen mizajou sou pwogrè ak bilten sou Common Voice
Your files are being assembled. Please check again later.
Fichye ou yo ap rasanble. Tanpri tcheke ankò pita.
